services.name: Storage Account
services.description: Retains original documents and processed artifacts in Blob containers.

services.name: Azure Event Grid
services.description: Publishes blob-created events to trigger document processing.

services.name: Azure Functions
services.description: Orchestrates OCR, summarization, indexing, and metadata persistence.

services.name: Document Intelligence
services.description: Extracts OCR text and structured fields from uploaded documents.

services.name: Azure OpenAI
services.description: Generates summaries and key themes from extracted document text.

services.name: Azure Cognitive Search
services.description: Indexes extracted and summarized content for fast retrieval.

services.name: Azure Cosmos DB
services.description: Stores document metadata, processing status, and references.

services.name: Microsoft Entra ID
services.description: Provides identity and access control for pipeline components.

services.name: Azure Monitor
services.description: Collects pipeline health metrics and execution telemetry.

services.name: Log Analytics
services.description: Centralized query and retention store for monitoring logs.

connections.label: Issue and validate workload identity tokens for orchestration runtime
Publish blob-created event when a new document lands in retention container
Trigger document processing function per upload event
Submit document URI for OCR and structured extraction
Return extracted text, tables, and key-value output
Send extracted content to generate concise summary and highlights
Return summarized narrative and key topics
Upsert searchable chunks and enrichment fields into search index
Persist metadata, processing state, and summary pointers
Write normalized extraction JSON and summary artifacts to Blob storage
Optionally resolve metadata filters and document facets during retrieval
Emit execution metrics, latency, and failure telemetry
Ingest and retain centralized logs for analysis and alerting

workflow.description: A document is uploaded to Blob storage and an event is generated for processing.
Event Grid triggers the orchestration function for the specific uploaded document.
The function authenticates with Microsoft Entra ID before invoking downstream services.
The function sends the document to Document Intelligence and receives OCR plus structured extraction results.
Extracted text is sent to Azure OpenAI to produce a summary and key insights.
Processed content is indexed in Azure Cognitive Search for fast semantic and keyword retrieval.
Metadata and processing status are stored in Cosmos DB, and enriched artifacts are saved back to Blob storage.
Pipeline telemetry is sent to Azure Monitor and retained in Log Analytics for operational visibility.

metadata.prompt: An intelligent document processing pipeline with Azure AI Document Intelligence for OCR, Azure OpenAI for summarization, Cognitive Search for indexing, Cosmos DB for metadata, and Blob Storage for document retention
